prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 80.9 kg; Height 184.4 cm; BMI 23.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 219mg/dL; 9 months ago 214mg/dL; 6 months ago 197mg/dL; 3 months ago 180mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.7kg; 9 months ago 79.9kg; 6 months ago 76.8kg; 3 months ago 82.1kg; current 80.9kg), Height (12 months ago 184.4cm; 9 months ago 184.4cm; 6 months ago 184.4cm; 3 months ago 184.4cm; current 184.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 23.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 63mmHg; 3 months ago 64mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 100U/L; 9 months ago 109U/L; 6 months ago 101U/L; 3 months ago 103U/L; current 98U/L), AST (12 months ago 80U/L; 9 months ago 80U/L; 6 months ago 84U/L; 3 months ago 82U/L; current 73U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 245mg/g; 9 months ago 348mg/g; 6 months ago 341mg/g; 3 months ago 345mg/g; current 273mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 109mg/dL; 9 months ago 111mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.4g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
